items.name: 石造地蔵菩薩
items.subcategory: 彫刻（町指定重要文化財）
items.description: 永禄12年（1569年）造立。町内最古の石像。

en.name_en: Stone Statue of the Bodhisattva Jizō
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property in the sculpture category, a stone statue of the bodhisattva Jizō. It is a town-designated important cultural property of Ōizumi Town, designated on 1979-11-30.

items.name: 阿弥陀三尊板碑
items.subcategory: 石造物（町指定重要文化財）
items.description: 永仁2年（1294年）銘。町最古の金石資料。

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property in the stone-object category, a stone stele (itabi) depicting the Amida triad. It is a town-designated important cultural property of Ōizumi Town, designated on 1979-11-30.

items.name: 白石家文書（346点）
items.subcategory: 古文書（町指定重要文化財）
items.description: 員数346点。個人所蔵のため非公開。

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property in the old-documents category, comprising 346 documents of the Shiraishi family. It is a town-designated important cultural property of Ōizumi Town, designated on 1983-12-01.

items.name: 小泉神社本殿および彫刻
items.subcategory: 建造物（町指定重要文化財）
items.description: 嘉永元年（1848年）〜嘉永7年（1854年）造営。

en.name_en: Main Hall and Carvings of Koizumi Shrine
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property in the buildings category, comprising the main hall (honden) of Koizumi Shrine and its carvings. It is a town-designated important cultural property of Ōizumi Town, designated on 1983-12-01.

items.name: 社日稲荷神社探湯神事
items.subcategory: 無形民俗文化財（町指定重要無形文化財）
items.description: 文化13年（1816年）以来伝承の神事。

en.name_en: Boiling-Water Ordeal Rite of Shanichi Inari Shrine
en.description_en: A folk cultural property, the kukatachi boiling-water ordeal rite of Shanichi Inari Shrine. It is a town-designated important intangible folk cultural property of Ōizumi Town, designated on 1979-11-30.

items.name: 仙石ささら舞い
items.subcategory: 無形民俗文化財（町指定重要無形文化財）
items.description: 元禄年間から伝承の獅子舞。

en.description_en: A folk cultural property, the Sengoku sasara dance. It is a town-designated important intangible folk cultural property of Ōizumi Town, designated on 1983-12-01.

items.name: 吉田西里神楽
items.subcategory: 無形民俗文化財（町指定重要無形文化財）
items.description: 江戸神楽の流れを引く里神楽。

en.description_en: A folk cultural property, the Yoshida Nishizato kagura sacred dance. It is a town-designated important intangible folk cultural property of Ōizumi Town, designated on 1984-10-12.

items.name: 小泉城跡（富岡城跡）附、城之内古墳（復元）
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 延徳元年（1489年）築城と伝わる。

en.name_romaji: Koizumi Jōshi (Tomioka Jōshi) Tsuketari Jōnouchi Kofun (Fukugen)
en.name_en: Koizumi Castle Ruins (Tomioka Castle Ruins), with the Reconstructed Jōnouchi Kofun
en.description_en: A monument (historic site), the ruins of Koizumi Castle (also known as Tomioka Castle), together with the reconstructed Jōnouchi burial mound. It is a town-designated historic site of Ōizumi Town, designated on 1979-11-30.

items.name: 伝、児島高徳墳墓
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: A monument (historic site), the reputed grave of Kojima Takanori. It is a town-designated historic site of Ōizumi Town, designated on 1979-11-30.

items.name: 青麻神社庚申塔（寛文9年銘）
items.subcategory: 有形民俗文化財（町指定重要民俗文化財）
items.description: 寛文9年（1669年）造立。町最古の庚申塔。

en.name_en: Kōshin Monument of Aoso Shrine (Dated Kanbun 9)
en.description_en: A folk cultural property, the Kōshin stone monument of Aoso Shrine bearing a Kanbun 9 (1669) inscription. It is a town-designated important tangible folk cultural property of Ōizumi Town, designated on 1983-12-01.
